Bash(SUPA_URL="https://pxpkwnyylynhqkbnpstc.supabase.co"
SUPA_KEY="eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6InB4cGt3bnl5bHluaHFrYm5wc3RjIiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3NzI3NTQ2MDksImV4cCI6MjA4ODMzMDYwOX0.pl4y6mLZsbE-V4zlPS3mmL7IeZuT1Xoz59Z20BqR9BU"

echo "=== Verify staff insert worked — check if our row exists ==="
curl -s "$SUPA_URL/rest/v1/staff?role=eq.Admin&select=*" \\
  -H "apikey: $SUPA_KEY" -H "Authorization: Bearer $SUPA_KEY"

echo -e "\\n\\n=== Can anon DELETE staff? ==="
curl -s -w "\\nHTTP: %{http_code}" "$SUPA_URL/rest/v1/staff?role=eq.Admin" \\
  -H "apikey: $SUPA_KEY" -H "Authorization: Bearer $SUPA_KEY" \\
  -X DELETE

echo -e "\\n\\n=== Can anon UPDATE staff roles? ==="
curl -s -w "\\nHTTP: %{http_code}" "$SUPA_URL/rest/v1/staff?role=eq.FrontDesk" \\
  -H "apikey: $SUPA_KEY" -H "Authorization: Bearer $SUPA_KEY" \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -X PATCH -d '{"role":"Admin"}'

echo -e "\\n\\n=== Can anon UPDATE all units? ==="
curl -s -w "\\nHTTP: %{http_code}" "$SUPA_URL/rest/v1/units?type=eq.ROOM&select=unit_number,base_price,status" \\
  -H "apikey: $SUPA_KEY" -H "Authorization: Bearer $SUPA_KEY")

Bash(SUPA_URL="https://pxpkwnyylynhqkbnpstc.supabase.co"
SUPA_KEY="eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6InB4cGt3bnl5bHluaHFrYm5wc3RjIiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3NzI3NTQ2MDksImV4cCI6MjA4ODMzMDYwOX0.pl4y6mLZsbE-V4zlPS3mmL7IeZuT1Xoz59Z20BqR9BU"

echo "=== Cleanup: delete the audit test staff row ==="
curl -s -w "\\nHTTP: %{http_code}" "$SUPA_URL/rest/v1/staff?user_id=is.null" \\
  -H "apikey: $SUPA_KEY" -H "Authorization: Bearer $SUPA_KEY" \\
  -X DELETE

echo -e "\\n\\n=== Verify cleanup ==="
curl -s "$SUPA_URL/rest/v1/staff?select=id,role,user_id" \\
  -H "apikey: $SUPA_KEY" -H "Authorization: Bearer $SUPA_KEY"

echo -e "\\n\\n=== Test: can anon download a specific aadhaar image? ==="
curl -s -w "\\nHTTP: %{http_code}" -o /dev/null "$SUPA_URL/storage/v1/object/aadhars/aadhar-e91ee6db-3aa4-458e-84ed-bccc5d848373-0-1773167123556.png" \\
  -H "apikey: $SUPA_KEY" -H "Authorization: Bearer $SUPA_KEY"

echo -e "\\n\\n=== Test: public URL access \(no auth\) ==="
curl -s -w "\\nHTTP: %{http_code}" -o /dev/null "$SUPA_URL/storage/v1/object/public/aadhars/aadhar-e91ee6db-3aa4-458e-84ed-bccc5d848373-0-1773167123556.png"

echo -e "\\n\\n=== Test: authenticated download with anon key ==="
curl -s -w "\\nHTTP: %{http_code}" -o /dev/null "$SUPA_URL/storage/v1/object/authenticated/aadhars/aadhar-e91ee6db-3aa4-458e-84ed-bccc5d848373-0-1773167123556.png" \\
  -H "apikey: $SUPA_KEY" -H "Authorization: Bearer $SUPA_KEY")
